# MVP Work Board

This board maps MVP ownership by package and tracks completion status.

## Owners

- Core domain package: `@familyco/core` owner = Backend/Core stream
- Server API package: `@familyco/server` owner = Backend/API stream
- UI contracts package (`packages/ui`): `@familyco/ui` owner = Frontend design-system stream
- Renderer app package (`apps/renderer`): `@familyco/web` owner = Frontend app stream
- Desktop shell package (`apps/desktop`): `@familyco/desktop` owner = Desktop integration stream
- CLI package: `@familyco/cli` owner = Ops tooling stream

## Status Board

- Governance baseline: done
- Monorepo bootstrap: done
- Domain core foundation: done
- Data/repository adapter: done
- Server API vertical slice: done
- UI and desktop skeleton: done
- Approval and engine guardrail: done
- End-to-end smoke and hardening: done
- Week-2 backlog seed: done
